title: Iran and U.S. trade strikes as deal to end war remains elusive
summary_full: U.S. Central Command said it targeted Iranian sites overlooking the strategic Strait of Hormuz, and Kuwait's military on Monday said it was responding to retaliatory airstrikes.
summary_public: U.S. Central Command said it targeted Iranian sites overlooking the strategic Strait of Hormuz, and Kuwait's military on Monday said it was responding to retaliatory airstrikes.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: targeted Iranian sites overlooking the strategic Strait of Hormuz
